Notifications: only new unread is 'Window Cleaning Business Owners has a new post' (3h, someone else's post) and group description change for 'Homeowners looking for Contractors and Remodelers' — zero comment notifications on Vito's Novaro AI posts. All other unreads (admin welcome tags, Cheryl likes photo, Ann/Cheryl friend confirmations, Sean Baker acceptance) predate last run. Messenger: Ann Giroux is sole unread thread — same DM already counted. Activity log: most recent Vito action is Mar 31 at 6:17 PM (admin welcome mention), nothing on Apr 1. Cumulative totals unchanged: 18 groups, 18 posts live, 116 comments, 39 positive, 4 DMs, 13 interest signals. Daily Apr 1 entry unchanged: {groups:18, posts:0, comments:3, positive:1, dms:1, interest:1}.

New acceptance since last run: Stefano Cardillo (SC Landscaping, Cranston RI) — cumulative requestsAccepted now 3. No new requests sent today. Messaging inbox at 9 unread — no new prospect replies. Active outbound threads with no responses: Colin Crump, Tyler Grodsky, David Kozak, Jason Stahlberg, William DeMichele, Michael Rose, Rich Iandoli. Stefano Cardillo now connected (outbound message sent Mar 31, no reply yet). Only inbound: Vincent Handugan VA counter-pitch (Mar 20, not a buying signal). No new interest signals.
